## Role summary

Senior individual contributor with mentoring expectations (2-3 mids).
Domain: ingestion pipelines (~50 GB/day) + public partner API.

## Requirements

### Must-have (blocking)

| # | Requirement | Type |
|---|---|---|
| M1 | 5+ years backend Python or Go in production | experience |
| M2 | PostgreSQL: indexes, query plans, migrations under load | technical |
| M3 | Event-driven / queue systems (Kafka, NATS, …) | technical |
| M4 | English working proficiency | language |
| M5 | Production ownership: oncall, postmortems, SLOs | mindset |

| N2 | Open-source contributions |
| N3 | AI engineering (LLMs in prod, RAG, vector stores) |

## Application instructions

> Apply with CV and a short note explaining one production incident
> you owned end-to-end.

→ A cover letter / incident narrative is **required**, not optional.
